allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\AdminAgro" -Recurse -Exclude ".git" | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\.git' } | Select-Object FullName, PSIsContainer | Sort-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { Write-Host "$\($_.FullName\)\\" } else { Write-Host $_.FullName } })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\AdminAgro" -Recurse -Exclude ".git", "env312" | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\(\\.git|env312\)' } | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName)

PowerShell(cd C:\\AdminAgro; $env:FLASK_ENV="development"; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\AdminAgro\\env312\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "main.py" -NoNewWindow -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Write-Host "Servidor iniciado")

PowerShell(cd C:\\AdminAgro; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\AdminAgro\\env312\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "main.py" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\AdminAgro" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 6; Write-Host "Inicio OK - Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($routes = @\("/cultivos", "/animales", "/inventario", "/labores", "/gastos"\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000$r" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "$r -> $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "$r -> ERROR: $_" } })

PowerShell($queries = @\("Hola", "como desparasito el ganado", "como llevo contabilidad", "que debo incluir en el inventario", "como programo labores"\); foreach \($q in $queries\) { $b = "message=" + [System.Web.HttpUtility]::UrlEncode\($q\); $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/chat" -Method POST -Body $b -ContentType "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -UseBasicParsing; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "P: $q"; Write-Host "R: $\($json.response.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, $json.response.Length\)\)\)"; Write-Host "" })
